authoritative_source.authority_status: official site/API/download routes recorded; headless probe encountered browser challenge; payload access not attempted
authoritative_source.version_pinning_strategy: pin by OMIM file/API release timestamp, retrieval date, terms version, file checksum, and authenticated endpoint after credentials and redistribution review

artifact_contract.freshness_rule: refresh probe metadata when OMIM access terms, API/download endpoints, file availability, repository inventory, or redistribution policy changes

fail_fast_probe_design.record_scope: one OMIM source record only after registration, credentials, API/download terms, and redistribution constraints are cleared
required_outputs: candidate comparison or crosswalk shell when applicable
success_criteria: OMIM authority, registration gate, and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
review handoff remains candidate-only and human-review-required

human_review_and_llm_policy.llm_output_allowed: metadata and review-assistance only until OMIM registration, credentials, and redistribution terms are cleared

telemetry.source_version: OMIM live release not downloaded; official site/API/download routes and GitHub organization recorded
telemetry.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: OMIM registration and credentials required before payload access
API/download terms and redistribution policy review required
release/version pinning required after authenticated access
gene-disease-phenotype evidence attribution rules required before downstream crosswalks
